cream.use: warm marshmallow base — for highlight strips, eyebrow chips

cream-soft.use: lifted cream — when cards must contrast against a snow page

snow.use: DEFAULT page background, default section background

paper.use: white card interiors on cream/snow surfaces

cocoa-deep.use: dark hot sections, footer, contained CTA cards

ember.use: primary CTA, italic accent text, focus ring, hover underline

ember-deep.use: ember on hover/active, ember text on cream when extra contrast needed

ember-soft.use: soft ember tint — chip backgrounds, dividers

honey.use: secondary accent — pop highlights, badges, mini-icons on dark

ink.use: primary body text, headings on light surfaces

hair-2.use: stronger border — cards on cream-soft, separators

warn.use: errors, destructive states. Distinct from ember.

color.rule: Never pure black (#000) and never pure gray. Ink is always chocolate. Borders are always translucent ink, never neutral gray.

sans.use: UI, body, ALL headlines except italic accent words

serif.stack: Fraunces, Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif
serif.use: ITALIC ACCENT ONLY — 1-2 words per scene, always ember-colored

eyebrow-italic.use: warm editorial eyebrow as alternative to all-caps eyebrow

typography.italicRule: Fraunces italic appears max once or twice per scene. Always 1-2 words, never a full sentence. Always colored ember. Use to add warmth to a sans-serif headline. Never set body text in serif. Never italicize multiple consecutive words.
typography.balanceRule: All H1/H2/Display use text-wrap: balance. All lede/body paragraphs use text-wrap: pretty.

spacing.rule: Always use the scale (4/8 base). Section vertical rhythm is 88px standard, 56px on mobile. Cards use 24-32px internal padding. Never invent arbitrary px values.

2xl.use: large card, contained CTA card, hero stage

shadow.rule: Shadows are ALWAYS chocolate-tinted (rgba(59,31,20,…)), never gray or black. Never combine shadow-lg with a hairline border — pick one.

snow.use: Default page section — most marketing content lives here
snow.heading: var(--color-ink)

cream-soft.use: Section that needs subtle separation from a snow neighbor — also when cards must read as cards
cream-soft.heading: var(--color-ink)

cream.use: Warmer section — UGC strip, testimonials, content that benefits from extra warmth
cream.heading: var(--color-ink)

paper.use: Sparingly — feature explainers, dense info layouts where pure white aids legibility
paper.heading: var(--color-ink)

cocoa-hot.use: Showpiece sections — the toolkit reveal, hero promo, contained CTA card. Use 1-2 times per page max.
cocoa-hot.heading: #FFFFFF

sectionRecipes.rule: A page should mix at most 3 recipes. Always alternate snow ↔ cream-soft for breathing room. Cocoa-hot is the climax — never two in a row.

rules: Primary = ember bg + paper text. The ONLY ember-filled element in a section.
Secondary = paper bg + ink text + hair-2 border.
Ghost = transparent bg + ink text + hair-2 border. Use for second action next to primary.
Link = ember text + underline on hover. Inline use only.
Default radius = md (10px). Pill (radius-full) only when explicitly desired.
Min hit target 44px on mobile.
Never two primary buttons in the same row of CTAs.
Default bg paper, border hair-3.
Focus = ember 2px outline at 2px offset. No box-shadow rings.
Error = warn border + warn-soft bg tint + warn helper text below.
Placeholder uses muted-2.
Default: paper bg, hair border, radius-xl, shadow-sm. Internal padding 24-32px.
On cream-soft sections, use hair-2 border for stronger contrast.
Hover: lift 2-3px and shadow-md.
Never combine a heavy shadow with a heavy border — pick one.
Pill (radius-full), 11px text, 600 weight, 1.6px tracking, uppercase.
AVAILABLE NOW = success-soft bg + success text.
COMING SOON = ember-soft bg + ember-deep text.
Pure label = paper bg + hair border + ink text.
FAQ pattern. Closed = + icon, ember on hover. Open = × icon in ember filled circle.
Item separator = hair, not card border.
Question = 16px ink semibold. Answer = body (14/22) ink-3.
Single item open at a time.
Sticky top, paper bg with hair-2 bottom border, blur backdrop.
Logo left, links center, primary CTA right.
Active link = ink. Inactive = ink-3. Hover = ink + ember underline.
cocoa-deep bg with honey eyebrow accents.
Wordmark + tagline left, link columns right.
Snow or cream-soft background. Eyebrow + display headline + lede + 1 primary CTA + 1 ghost CTA.
Right side: 3D imagery slot OR product shot if hero is e-commerce.
Mascot NEVER appears at hero scale. Only as a small icon adjacent to text.

productCard.use: E-commerce — Add to cart tiles. THIS is where product photography appears.
rules: Paper bg, hair-2 border, radius-xl.
Square product photo on cream-soft backdrop.
Product name (h3) + price (h3 weight 600) + Add to cart (primary button).
Never use 3D nano-banana imagery here — must be real product photography.
Cream or paper bg, hair border, radius-xl.
Quote in body (14/22) ink-2.
Author = name (semibold ink) + role (meta muted).
All marketing imagery sits in this frame.
Border radius-xl, shadow-sm, hair border.
Aspect-ratio honored — 16/9 hero, 1/1 product, 4/5 portrait.

languageSwitcher.placement: Top-right of nav OR footer corner — pick one per page, never both
rules: EN | FR. No flags (flags = country, language ≠ country).
Active language ink, inactive muted, divider hair-2.

iconography.style: outline default. Filled only for active/selected states.
iconography.color: ink by default. ember when accent. paper on cocoa-hot surfaces.
iconography.rule: All icons share one stroke weight and corner style. Never mix outline icon families with filled icon families in the same module.

mascot.rule: Mascot only ever appears at ICON scale (16-32px) as a small companion graphic next to text. NEVER as illustration, hero, or photographic-style imagery.
mascot.reason: Product is real 3D photography (e-commerce) and 3D-rendered nano-banana imagery (marketing). Mascot is a 2D cartoon — mixing scales/styles breaks visual coherence. At icon size, the mascot reads as a system glyph, not a competing illustration.
allowedSlots: Inline next to a label or CTA (16px)
forbiddenSlots: Anywhere the mascot would compete with product photography
mascot.frequency: Max 2 mascot icons per page. Often zero is correct.
mascot.asset: Mascot icon assets are generated separately (nano-banana). Available in 16/20/24/32 px PNG with transparent background. Use the inventory list when available.

imagery.twoTrackRule: There are exactly two image tracks in Shmocard. Never blend them in the same module.

marketing-3d.what: 3D-rendered scenes generated in nano-banana — toolkit shots, ambient props, environmental textures, illustrative compositions.
marketing-3d.where: All marketing surfaces — hero stages, section illustrations, feature explainers, footer flourishes.
marketing-3d.backdrop: Cream, snow, or cocoa-deep — never on paper white.

product-photography.what: Real studio photography of the physical Shmocard product.
product-photography.where: E-commerce ONLY — product detail pages, Add-to-cart tiles, checkout, order confirmation.
product-photography.framing: Square aspect, cream-soft backdrop, no drop shadow on the photo itself (the card already has subject lighting).
product-photography.rule: Never appears in marketing flow surfaces. Never alongside 3D imagery in the same component.

states.hover: subtle lift (translateY -2px or -3px) + shadow-md OR color shift to ember-deep / honey-deep
states.focus: 2px ember outline at 2px offset, radius-sm. No box-shadow rings. Apply via :focus-visible only.
states.disabled: opacity 0.5, cursor not-allowed, no hover effects
states.error: warn color border + warn-soft bg tint + warn helper text

i18n.rule: French copy runs ~15-25% longer than English. Components must flex.
guidance: Buttons: never fixed-width. Use min-width and let content size.
Headlines: never assume single-line layout. Allow 2-3 lines and use text-wrap: balance.
Nav items: allow wrap or compress to a hamburger earlier on smaller breakpoints when in FR.
Eyebrows: 11px uppercase still works in FR but watch tracking — French often needs slightly tighter (1.4px instead of 1.6px) when the word is long.
Truncation is forbidden in primary CTAs and pricing labels.
i18n.switcher: EN | FR text toggle. No flags. Place once per page (nav OR footer).

donts: Never use pure black (#000) — ink is always chocolate.
Never use pure gray for borders — borders are always translucent ink.
Never use Fraunces serif for body text or for >2 consecutive words.
Never use ember as a flood color — it is an accent, not a surface.
Never put two primary buttons next to each other in the same CTA group.
Never use the mascot at illustration/hero scale.
Never mix 3D marketing imagery with product photography in the same module.
Never invent spacing values outside the 4/8 scale.
Never combine shadow-lg with a heavy hairline border on the same element.
Never use emojis as decorative accents.
Never use gradient backgrounds outside the cocoa-hot recipe (where the honey radial glow is approved).
Never use rounded corners with a left-border accent stripe — that's a SaaS-blog cliché, not Shmocard.
Never use icons drawn from multiple icon families in one module.
